rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH MARASCO VS. ANA E. DE LEO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT Anna E. DELAO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Plaintiff failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B continued to 2/16/12 9:30AM. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B by 4PM 1/27/12.
